common.readyToAnalyzeDesc: Enter any market topic and get evidence-backed insights in seconds.
common.noPublishedAnalysesFirst: No published analyses yet. Be the first!
common.onlyAnalysis: This is the only analysis for this asset so far.

landing.heroDesc: Type an asset, sector, macro, or policy move. TrendAnalysis reuses the best public report when it exists and starts a fresh run when the market context changed.
landing.heroQuestionHint: We resolve to the best public answer first, then open a fresh run only when needed.
landing.searchPlaceholder: Ask one market question: BTC, NVDA, gold, oil, yields, tariffs...
landing.trendingNowDesc: These asset hubs already have current public context. Open one before starting a new run if you want the latest baseline fast.
landing.realTimeIntelDesc: Resolve the best public match first, then launch a fresh run only when the evidence needs updating.
landing.knowledgeGraphsDesc: Inspect the same run across graph, mind map, flow, and timeline without leaving the research context.
landing.publishedReportsDesc: Published reports preserve the narrative, evidence, and asset context so the next question starts from a usable baseline.
landing.hubAssetsDesc: Use asset hubs to review the latest public baseline, linked reports, and recurring catalysts before running a fresh query.
landing.hubReportsDesc: Read the latest published explanation when a question already has a strong public match and only rerun when the market context changed.
landing.hubToolsDesc: Tool pages are supporting entry points for specific workflows. They should route users back into reports and asset hubs.
landing.rejectFallback: This query is outside the market workflow.
landing.marketOnlyHint: Best results come from one concrete market question. Off-domain prompts stay outside the public workflow.
landing.flowQuestionDesc: Start with an asset, sector, macro theme, or policy move instead of a general prompt.
landing.flowResolveDesc: If a published report or asset hub already covers it, TrendAnalysis routes you there first.
landing.flowRunDesc: Launch a fresh terminal run when the evidence is stale, missing, or intentionally private.
landing.publicRoutesLabel: Or start from a public surface:
landing.continueDesc: Use the question flow for fresh work, open reports when a public answer already exists, and use asset hubs for recurring market baselines.
landing.terminalCardDesc: Open the terminal when you need a new run, a private draft, or a rerun against the latest evidence.
landing.trendingFallbackSummary: Open the asset hub for the latest public baseline, linked reports, and recurring catalysts.

tools.pageDesc: Evidence-first tools powered by live data pipelines and AI analysis. Choose a tool to get started.
tools.trendAnalyzerDesc: Search any market topic and get an AI-generated evidence map with live data from multiple sources, sentiment analysis, and entity extraction.
tools.evidenceGraphDesc: Visualize relationships between assets, events, entities, and sources in an interactive knowledge graph with confidence-scored edges.
tools.newsAnalyzerDesc: Track how news stories cluster, detect momentum shifts, and follow catalyst chains across market events with timeline visualization.

toolPages.trendAnalyzerFullDesc: Search any market topic and get AI-generated evidence maps with live data, sentiment analysis, and entity extraction from multiple sources.
toolPages.trendAnalyzerPlaceholder: e.g. NVDA earnings impact, Fed rate decision...
toolPages.trendAnalyzerStats: Aggregates 10+ sources per query across news, analysis, and social channels.
toolPages.evidenceGraphFullDesc: Visualize how assets, events, entities, and sources connect. Build interactive knowledge graphs from live market data with confidence-scored relationships.
toolPages.evidenceGraphPlaceholder: e.g. tech sector earnings, AI infrastructure supply chain...
toolPages.evidenceGraphStats: Generates up to 24 nodes and 36 edges per analysis with 4 relationship types.
toolPages.newsAnalyzerFullDesc: Track how news stories cluster, detect momentum shifts, and follow catalyst chains across market events with timeline visualization and sentiment scoring.
toolPages.newsAnalyzerPlaceholder: e.g. Fed rate decision impact, oil price catalysts...
toolPages.newsAnalyzerStats: Tracks up to 12 timeline events and 6 story clusters per analysis session.
toolPages.livePipelineDesc: Real-time SERP queries and web scraping via Bright Data. Fresh signals from news, analysis, and social sources within seconds.
toolPages.aiAnalysisDesc: LLM extracts entities, catalysts, and sentiment from each evidence source. Every claim is linked back to its original URL.
toolPages.evidenceLinkingDesc: Automatic relationship detection between assets, events, and entities. Confidence-scored edges connect related evidence items.
toolPages.multiSourceDesc: Combines news articles, financial reports, social media, and analysis pieces into a single unified evidence workspace.
toolPages.knowledgeGraphDesc: Automatically generated graph connecting assets, events, entities, and sources. Up to 24 nodes and 36 edges per analysis.
toolPages.typedNodesDesc: Five node types: asset (stocks, crypto), event (earnings, policy), entity (companies, people), source (articles), and media (videos, podcasts).
toolPages.confidenceEdgesDesc: Four edge types: mentions, co-moves, hypothesis, and same-story. Each edge carries a confidence score and links back to supporting evidence.
toolPages.impactDetectionDesc: Spillover analysis detects cross-asset impact chains. Orphan repair ensures every node connects to the broader evidence network.
toolPages.timelineViewDesc: Chronological event tape showing market-moving events with tags, timestamps, and linked evidence for each entry.
toolPages.storyClusteringDesc: Groups related evidence into story clusters with momentum indicators: rising, steady, or fading. Up to 6 clusters per analysis.
toolPages.sentimentAnalysisDesc: Per-source sentiment scoring with confidence levels. Aggregated view shows net market sentiment across all evidence items.
toolPages.catalystTrackingDesc: Identifies and chains market catalysts across sources. Tracks how a single event propagates through related assets and narratives.

trending.pageDesc: Discover what markets are being analyzed right now

terminal.searchPlaceholder: Ask a market-moving topic... Bitcoin, NVDA, DXY, oil, CPI
terminal.snapshotLoaded: Snapshot loaded from history. No automatic refresh is running.
terminal.emptyTopic: Enter a market topic before starting a run.
terminal.marketOnlyHint: Use market questions only: asset, sector, macro, policy, or event-driven moves. Off-domain prompts stay in draft and cannot become public reports.
terminal.rejectFallback: This query is outside the market workflow.

queryResolution.reuseDescription: A semantic match already exists for this query. Open the current result first, or refresh it with the same typed query.
queryResolution.ambiguousHint: Choose a likely match or run the typed query as-is
queryResolution.ambiguousTitle: Did you mean one of these?
queryResolution.ambiguousDescription: The query is market-relevant, but it is close to more than one cached subject. Picking one avoids an unnecessary rerun.
queryResolution.privateSessionHint: This query will be saved, but it will not become a public report page.

dashboard.noSessionsDesc: Run a topic in the terminal to populate history.
dashboard.selectSessionDesc: Pick a session to view stored artifacts and the pipeline trace.
dashboard.noArtifactsDesc: No artifacts stored on this session yet.

howItWorks.title: How TrendAnalysis.ai Works
howItWorks.description: See how live search, evidence extraction, graph building, and replay snapshots fit together in the current TrendAnalysis.ai product shell.
howItWorks.notesHint: Production intent for the current product shell
howItWorks.dataLayerBody: Bright Data provides SERP and page extraction; AI reasoning uses only collected evidence.
howItWorks.artifactLayerBody: Each run produces evidence, tape, graph links, and narrative clusters, then persists replay-ready snapshots.
howItWorks.uiLayerBody: A map-first workspace combines graph, timeline, inspector, and dashboard replay into a single research surface.

metadata.homeDesc: Ask one market-moving question, route into the best public report or asset hub, and run fresh evidence-backed analysis only when needed.
metadata.toolsDesc: Supporting market research tools for inspecting search, price, video, and graph workflows behind TrendAnalysis.ai asset hubs and reports.
metadata.trendingDesc: Discover the latest published market explanations and active asset hubs across TrendAnalysis.ai.
metadata.assetIndexDesc: Browse market asset hubs with published reports, recurring catalysts, sentiment shifts, and internal report history.
metadata.howItWorksDesc: Learn how TrendAnalysis.ai turns live search results into evidence maps, market narratives, and replayable research sessions.
metadata.dashboardDesc: Session history, monitor status, and replay tools for TrendAnalysis.ai. This page is available for operators but not intended for search indexing.
metadata.terminalDesc: Interactive market research terminal for live runs and replay sessions. This page is available for operators but not intended for search indexing.
metadata.trendAnalyzerDesc: Analyze any market topic with live SERP data, AI-powered evidence extraction, sentiment analysis, and entity linking. Free stock news analysis tool.
metadata.evidenceGraphTitle: Evidence Graph Builder - Market Knowledge Graph
metadata.evidenceGraphDesc: Build interactive knowledge graphs from market evidence. Visualize relationships between assets, events, entities, and news sources with confidence scoring.
metadata.newsAnalyzerTitle: News Impact Analyzer - Market News Analysis
metadata.newsAnalyzerDesc: Analyze how news impacts markets with timeline visualization, story clustering, sentiment analysis, and catalyst tracking. Free market news analyzer.

workspace.title: Evidence Workspace
workspace.descEmpty: Run a topic, then work directly in Graph / Mind / Flow / Timeline
workspace.descActive: Map-first view with linked evidence, media, and timeline filters
workspace.emptyDesc: Run a topic and the map will include evidence, media links, and timeline points.
workspace.openingSnapshotDesc: Restoring your saved evidence map and timeline exactly as captured.
workspace.buildingMapDesc: Linking sources, events, assets, and media into a single map workspace.
workspace.graphHelp: Scroll to zoom. Drag to pan. Click nodes/links to inspect evidence.
workspace.inferredEdgeNoEvidence: Structural inference; no direct evidence is attached to this edge.
workspace.pipelineHint: Ask a topic. The terminal will plan queries, pull sources with Bright Data, then map and cluster the story.
workspace.panelsUpdatedDesc: tape, map, narratives, price context, videos
workspace.activityHint: Ask a topic to start. The system will plan queries, pull sources with Bright Data, and build an evidence map you can inspect.
workspace.scrapeSkipped: Scrape is skipped in Fast mode.
workspace.tipClickNode: Tip: click a node or edge to open evidence in the Inspector.
workspace.noDataYet: No data yet. Run a topic to populate.
workspace.runTopicForPrice: Run a topic to render price context.
workspace.runTopicForMedia: Run a topic to load videos.
workspace.noVideosFound: No videos found for this topic.
workspace.mindMapDesc: Story-first view: catalysts, channels, and impact from the graph.
workspace.flowDesc: Lane view with strongest links. Click a node or line to focus the path.
workspace.connectedWith: connected with {nodeCount} nodes across {linkCount} visible links
workspace.showingTop: Showing top 22. Use Graph for the full set.
workspace.flowTip: Tip: click a pill to highlight connected routes (no inspector jump), or click a line to focus that exact edge.
